name: Castlevania - Circle of the Moon
description: Castlevania: Circle of the Moon is a launch title for the Game Boy Advance and the first of three Castlevania games released for the handheld in the "Metroidvania" format.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Completion Goal
options.description: The goal for game completion.

options.label: Ignore Cleansing
options.description: Removes the logical requirement for the Cleansing to go beyond the first Underground Waterway rooms from either of the area's sides.

options.label: Auto Run
options.description: Makes Nathan always run when pressing left or right without needing to double-tap.

options.label: Dss Patch
options.description: Patches out being able to pause during the DSS startup animation and switch the cards in the menu to use any combos you don't currently have, as well as changing the element of a summon to one you don't currently have.

options.label: Always Allow Speed Dash
options.description: Allows activating the speed dash combo (Pluto + Griffin) without needing the respective cards first.

options.label: Iron Maiden Behavior
options.description: Sets how the iron maiden barriers blocking the entrances to Underground Gallery and Waterway will behave.

options.label: Required Last Keys
options.description: How many Last Keys are needed to open the door to the Ceremonial Room.

options.label: Available Last Keys
options.description: How many Last Keys are in the pool in total.

options.label: Buff Ranged Familiars
options.description: Makes Familiar projectiles deal double damage to enemies.

options.label: Buff Sub Weapons
options.description: Increases damage dealt by sub-weapons and item crushes in Shooter and non-Shooter Modes.

options.label: Buff Shooter Strength
options.description: Increases Nathan's strength in Shooter Mode to match his strength in Vampire Killer Mode.

options.label: Item Drop Randomization
options.description: Randomizes what enemies drop what items as well as the drop rates for said items.

options.label: Halve Dss Cards Placed
options.description: Places only half of the DSS Cards in the item pool.

options.label: Countdown
options.description: Displays, below and near the right side of the MP bar, the number of un-found progression/useful-marked items or the total check locations remaining in the area you are currently in.

options.label: Sub Weapon Shuffle
options.description: Randomizes which sub-weapon candles have which sub-weapons.

options.label: Disable Battle Arena Mp Drain
options.description: Makes the Battle Arena not drain Nathan's MP, so that DSS combos can be used like normal.

options.label: Required Skirmishes
options.description: Forces a Last Key after every boss or after every boss and the Battle Arena and forces the required Last Keys to enter the Ceremonial Room to 8 or 9 for All Bosses and All Bosses And Arena respectively.

options.label: Pluto Griffin Air Speed
options.description: Increases Nathan's air speeds with the Pluto + Griffin combo active to be the same as his ground speeds.

options.label: Skip Dialogues
options.description: Skips all cutscene dialogue besides the ending.

options.label: Skip Tutorials
options.description: Skips all Magic Item and DSS-related tutorial textboxes.

options.label: Nerf Roc Wing
options.description: Initially nerfs the Roc Wing by removing its ability to jump infinitely and reducing its jump height.

options.label: Early Escape Item
options.description: Ensures the chosen Catacomb escape item will be placed in a starting location within your own game, accessible with nothing.

options.label: Battle Arena Music
options.description: Enables any looping song from the game to play inside the Battle Arena instead of it being silent the whole time.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.
